description: Read 'A Scandal in Bohemia' from The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes (located at /home/ga/Documents/sherlock_holmes.txt) and create a structured case analysis document in the Sugar Write activity. The document must contain four sections with these exact headings: 'Case Summary' (a brief summary of the case involving the King of Bohemia and Irene Adler), 'Characters' (a list identifying at least 4 characters), 'Clues and Deductions' (a description of Holmes's deductive strategies), and 'Conclusion' (a description of how the case ended). Save the completed document as an ODT file to /home/ga/Documents/case_analysis.odt.
